{{Quote|My hearin' Baobab say mesa Force-sensitive? Is dat bein' right?|Wert Jopi|<ref name="SWG:AED">{{GalaxiesAED}}</ref>}}
'''Wert Jopi''' was a [[Gungan/Legends|Gungan]] on [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] who was believed to be [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]].

In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]], [[Ebenn Q3 Baobab/Legends|Ebenn Q3 Baobab]] hired a guide under the pretense of escorting "that Jedi Knight, what's-his-name" into [[Moenia/Legends|Moenia]] for dinner. The real reason for bringing Jopi into Moenia was unknown.

==Appearances==
*{{GalaxiesAED}} {{1st}}
